summary: Adjusted the closing handoff so the Kondos settle on their main-hall mats, Venn's read on Arash stays emotional rather than locational, and the final image now leads directly into Chapter 14's sleepless pre-dawn room.
edits: Shifted the late-chapter staging from the sleeping quarters to the Kondo mats along the inner wall to match the next chapter's layout.
Revised Venn's certainty about Arash from knowing where he was to knowing what he was moving toward.
Added a brief false-stillness beat at the end to bridge into the next chapter's wakeful morning aftermath.
